prompt: A dramatic vertical football transfer-announcement poster for AC Milan featuring Kylian Mbappé as the sole star, designed like a premium sports social media graphic. The composition has 2 views of the same player: a huge back-facing upper-body portrait dominating the top-right background, showing the back of the black-and-red striped AC Milan jersey with the name across the shoulders and the large number 10, and a full-body action pose in the foreground running toward the viewer with one hand raised and index finger pointing upward. The player is a young Black male athlete with a close-cropped haircut and powerful build. He wears a modern AC Milan home kit: black and red vertical striped shirt, black shorts with the number 10, black socks, dark football boots, visible Puma logos, the AC Milan crest, and the chest sponsor text "Emirates Fly Better." Use a black, crimson, and deep red palette with intense contrast, smoky atmosphere, glowing red haze near the ground, scattered embers, faint scratches, and cinematic rim lighting. In the background place 3 major graphic elements: the red-tinted gothic Duomo di Milano cathedral silhouette on the left, a large glowing AC Milan circular crest on the right, and oversized semi-transparent numerals "10" behind the running figure. Add editorial typography integrated into the poster: at the top left put "AC MILAN" with "1899" beneath it and a small club crest, on the left center stack the first name small above a very large tall-serif last name reading "MBAPPÉ", beneath that add a red handwritten signature-style scribble, and on the upper right edge place the vertical slogan "SEMPRE SEMPRE MILAN". The style should feel like elite football poster design, transfer reveal campaign art, glossy, aggressive, modern, photorealistic with graphic-design compositing, ultra-detailed fabric texture, dramatic shadows, and a high-end Champions League promo aesthetic. --ar 9:16
